center.name: 比奥比奥大区
center.summary: 比奥比奥大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白胁山蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-sided hillstar is found in the Andes from central Bolivia's Cochabamba Department south through Chile to the Biobío Region and Argentina as far south as Santa Cruz Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-sided hillstar is found in the Andes from central Bolivia's Cochabamba Department south through Chile to the Biobío Region and Argentina as far south as Santa Cruz Province
